title: Alchogolism
description: This mod makes every party greater by adding vodka, strong vodka, a cocktail and wine!
body:
# This mod makes every party better!

This mod adds alcoholic drinks and every item is survival friendly:)

I'm the only one who works on the mod and I barely have any mod making experience and I try make every item as polished as it gets but in my current state, there wont be any advanced features unless it's the final version of mod;). This mod was made in MCreator. 

This is my second mod I published so please don't be too judgemental.
If you want to see my first mod(don't) then you can click on this link here: 
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombies-attacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombies-attacks)
